name: ErrEscrowNotFound
recovery: verify escrow_id via GET /oasyce/settlement/v1/escrow/{id}

name: ErrInvalidStatus
recovery: check escrow status — only LOCKED escrows can be released/refunded

name: ErrUnauthorized
recovery: only the escrow creator or provider can release/refund

name: ErrInsufficientFunds
recovery: check balance via GET /cosmos/bank/v1beta1/balances/{address}

name: ErrEscrowExpired
recovery: escrow has been auto-refunded after timeout — create a new one

name: ErrInvalidAddress
recovery: use valid bech32 address with oasyce prefix

name: ErrInvalidParams
recovery: check param values against GET /oasyce/settlement/v1/params

name: ErrBondingCurveNotFound
recovery: no purchases yet for this asset — first buy initializes the curve

name: ErrInvalidAssetID
recovery: verify asset exists via GET /oasyce/datarights/v1/data_asset/{id}

name: ErrCapabilityNotFound
recovery: verify capability_id via GET /oasyce/capability/v1/capability/{id}

name: ErrUnauthorized
recovery: only the capability creator can update/deactivate

name: ErrInactive
recovery: capability was deactivated — cannot invoke

name: ErrRateLimitExceeded
recovery: wait and retry — check rate_limit field on capability

name: ErrInsufficientStake
recovery: provider must stake min_provider_stake (check params)

name: ErrInvalidInput
recovery: input JSON must be valid and non-empty

name: ErrInvocationNotFound
recovery: verify invocation_id — check tx hash for the invoke transaction

name: ErrInvalidStatus
recovery: invocation not in expected state — query current status first

name: ErrChallengeWindow
recovery: claim too early (window not elapsed) or dispute too late (window passed)

name: ErrEmptyOutputHash
recovery: CompleteInvocation requires output_hash >= 32 characters

name: ErrAssetNotFound
recovery: verify asset_id via GET /oasyce/datarights/v1/data_asset/{id}

name: ErrDisputeNotFound
recovery: verify dispute_id via GET /oasyce/datarights/v1/dispute/{id}

name: ErrNotArbitrator
recovery: only the designated arbitrator can resolve disputes

name: ErrAssetDelisted
recovery: asset is no longer active — cannot buy/sell shares

name: ErrInvalidCoCreators
recovery: co-creator list must contain valid addresses within max_co_creators limit

name: ErrInvalidAddress
recovery: use valid bech32 address with oasyce prefix

name: ErrInsufficientFunds
recovery: check balance via GET /cosmos/bank/v1beta1/balances/{address}

name: ErrInvalidParams
recovery: check param values against GET /oasyce/datarights/v1/params

name: ErrUnauthorized
recovery: only the asset owner can perform this action

name: ErrInvalidRightsType
recovery: rights_type must be a valid DataRightsType enum value

name: ErrDisputeNotOpen
recovery: dispute already resolved or timed out — cannot resolve again

name: ErrDuplicateAsset
recovery: an asset with this content hash already exists

name: ErrContentHashMismatch
recovery: provided content hash does not match stored hash

name: ErrSlippageExceeded
recovery: price moved — retry with higher min_shares_out or min_payout_out

name: ErrAssetShuttingDown
recovery: asset is in shutdown — can only claim settlement after cooldown

name: ErrAssetSettled
recovery: asset fully settled — no further operations possible

name: ErrCooldownNotElapsed
recovery: wait for cooldown period before claiming settlement

name: ErrNoSharesHeld
recovery: must hold shares to claim settlement or sell

name: ErrAssetNotShuttingDown
description: asset is not in shutting down state
recovery: initiate-shutdown first before claiming settlement

name: ErrMigrationNotFound
recovery: no migration path exists between these asset versions

name: ErrMigrationDisabled
recovery: target owner disabled this migration path

name: ErrMigrationCapExceeded
recovery: max_migrated_shares reached — cannot migrate more

name: ErrInvalidVersion
recovery: target asset must be a direct descendant of source asset

name: ErrMigrationExists
recovery: a migration path between these assets already exists

name: ErrInvalidRating
recovery: rating must be 0-500

name: ErrDuplicateFeedback
recovery: feedback already submitted for this invocation

name: ErrInvocationNotFound
recovery: verify invocation_id exists

name: ErrSelfFeedback
recovery: feedback must be from a different address than the provider

name: ErrCooldownActive
recovery: wait 3600s between feedback submissions to the same address

name: ErrInvalidAddress
recovery: use valid bech32 address with oasyce prefix

name: ErrInvalidParams
recovery: check param values against GET /oasyce/reputation/v1/params

name: ErrTaskNotFound
recovery: verify task_id via GET /oasyce/work/v1/task/{id}

name: ErrInvalidStatus
recovery: task not in expected state — query current status first

name: ErrUnauthorized
recovery: only assigned executor can commit/reveal for this task

name: ErrInvalidAddress
recovery: use valid bech32 address with oasyce prefix

name: ErrInvalidParams
recovery: check param values against GET /oasyce/work/v1/params

name: ErrInvalidBounty
description: bounty must be positive and meet minimum
recovery: check min_bounty in GET /oasyce/work/v1/params

name: ErrInvalidTimeout
description: timeout blocks out of allowed range
recovery: must be between min_timeout_blocks and max_timeout_blocks in params

name: ErrInvalidRedundancy
recovery: set redundancy to at least 1 (default from params)

name: ErrInvalidInputHash
recovery: provide sha256 hex string (64 chars)

name: ErrExecutorNotFound
recovery: register first via tx work register-executor

name: ErrExecutorExists
recovery: use update-executor to modify existing profile

name: ErrExecutorInactive
recovery: reactivate via tx work update-executor with active=true

name: ErrCommitmentExists
recovery: cannot commit twice — wait for reveal phase

name: ErrCommitmentNotFound
recovery: submit commit-result first, then reveal-result

name: ErrRevealMismatch
recovery: sha256(output_hash + salt + executor + unavailable) must match committed hash

name: ErrResultExists
recovery: cannot reveal twice for the same task

name: ErrSelfAssignment
description: task creator cannot be assigned as executor
recovery: use a different address to execute this task

name: ErrInsufficientReputation
recovery: build reputation via feedback before taking tasks with min_reputation requirements

name: ErrDisputeBondTooLow
recovery: increase dispute bond to meet bounty × dispute_bond_rate

name: ErrNotEnoughExecutors
recovery: wait for more executors to register or lower redundancy

name: ErrTaskTypeNotSupported
description: executor does not support this task type
recovery: update executor profile to add this task type

name: ErrInvalidTaskType
recovery: specify a non-empty task_type string

name: ErrRegistrationNotFound
recovery: address not yet registered — use tx onboarding register

name: ErrInvalidAddress
recovery: use valid bech32 address with oasyce prefix

name: ErrInvalidParams
recovery: check param values against GET /oasyce/onboarding/v1/params

name: ErrInsufficientFunds
recovery: check balance via GET /cosmos/bank/v1beta1/balances/{address}

name: ErrAlreadyRegistered
recovery: this address is already registered — cannot register twice

name: ErrInvalidPoW
recovery: nonce does not satisfy difficulty — re-solve with oasyced util solve-pow

name: ErrNotActive
recovery: registration cancelled or defaulted

name: ErrDeadlineNotPassed
recovery: cannot force-default before 90-day deadline
